mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{roleCode}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, real_name, role_code, phone, email, avatar_url FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = COALESCE(#{profile.realName}, real_name), phone = COALESCE(#{profile.phone}, phone), email = COALESCE(#{profile.email}, email), avatar_url = COALESCE(#{profile.avatarUrl}, avatar_url) WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
